hero.headline: Neatnik
hero.body: Family-owned car detailing in Fairfield, Maine — careful work, honest quotes, and a finish that doesn’t cut corners.

servicesIntro.title: Straight-ahead detailing done with care
servicesIntro.body: Interior, exterior, or the full treatment — vacuum, sprays, hand wash, and the finishing touches that make the difference.
servicesIntro.footerNote: Prices vary by vehicle size and condition.

why.title: Family-owned pride in every finish
why.body: Neatnik isn’t a rush-through wash. It’s a family-owned detailing brand built on careful work, honest communication, and staying with the job until your vehicle looks genuinely good.
bullets: Family-owned and locally rooted in Fairfield
No shortcuts on the steps that protect your paint and cabin
Clear communication before and after the detail
Serving Fairfield and the surrounding Mid-Maine towns

testimonials.quote: They treated my truck like it was their own. Showed up on time, stayed until it was right, and the cabin still smelled clean a week later.
testimonials.name: Local customer

testimonials.quote: I don’t trust just anybody with the family car. Neatnik was careful, honest about what it needed, and the results spoke for themselves.
testimonials.name: Local customer

testimonials.quote: No rush job. You can tell Neatnik takes pride in the finish — exactly what you want when you’re paying for a real detail.
testimonials.name: Local customer

faq.q: How long does a detail take?
faq.a: Most interior or exterior packages run a few hours. A full detail can take half a day depending on the vehicle’s size and condition.

faq.q: Do you come to me or do I drop off?
faq.a: Reach out and we’ll work out what makes sense for your schedule and location within the Fairfield service area.

faq.q: Why don’t prices list exact totals?
faq.a: A compact sedan and a muddy truck aren’t the same job. You’ll get a clear quote once we know the vehicle and what you want done.
Quality detailing chemicals, towels, and tools suited to everyday Maine vehicles — nothing fancy for show, just what gets a lasting clean finish.

cta.title: Ready for a cleaner ride?
cta.body: Reach out with your vehicle type and what you’d like done. You’ll get a clear plan and a fair quote — no pressure, no guesswork.
